name: Sikotakia Marinata (Marinated Liver)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the liver into desired thickness.
2. Dredge each slice in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat oil or butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
4. Fry liver slices until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Remove the liver and set aside on a plate.
6. In the same pan, add 1/2 cup of oil. Cook until hot.
7. Gradually whisk in 2 tablespoons of flour into the oil, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until smooth.
8. Slowly add vinegar, tomato paste mixed with water, rosemary (if using), bay leaf, salt, and pepper to the pan.
9. Stir to combine all ingredients and bring to a simmer.
10. Cook the sauce for 5-10 minutes, ensuring it does not thicken too much.
11. Add the liver slices back into the sauce and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
12. Serve hot or cold.
NOTE: Liver prepared in this fashion will keep for several days, especially during the winter.
